title: なけなしのレイトショー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One night, I pass by a movie theater on my way
back from shopping, when...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeahhh! We made it in time for the late showing!
Two student tickets, please!

text_block_list.name: Box Office Clerk
text_block_list.text: Sorry, no children allowed.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! Who you callin' a child?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Creek. Let's head in.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We're not kids, it's true... But I don't think we'll be
able to watch this movie, after all...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Look at the time. We'll never make it back before
curfew.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Curfew? Crap!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You're right, the movie's too long.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What to do... Movie, or curfew...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Um, I know how you feel, Tamtam, but we can't
be late getting back. So there's only one thing to
do, right?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Right! Watch the movie!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And break curfew? Tamtam, when did you
become so naughty?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Stop treatin' me like a child! It'd be whatever if
this was just a regular movie.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But this is True Stories of Showa Umamusume we're talkin' about! I need to watch it now!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I know my priorities, and gettin' better at runnin'
comes before curfew!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'll break whatever rules I have to if it means doin'
something important to me. I'll watch it alone if I
have to!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Tamtam... I can't let you go home by yourself so
late at night. So I guess I'll...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Hold on a sec. Looks like it's from my little
brother and sister.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Um... What da heck?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Aw, forget about it. Sorry, Creek. Can I take a
rain check on the movie?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Tamtam?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's nothin'. You're right, we've gotta follow the
rules and all that!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ah, man... I really thought the money I sent would
be enough for Mom's birthday present.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But if I send the money I was gonna use tonight,
they should have enough.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: There we go.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm countin' on ya, runts. Keep Mom and Dad
happy while I'm gone.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I really wanted to see that movie, but ah well! I
know my priorities!
